label: Hexagonal — enthusiast
summary: Start with domain, application, presentation, and persistence. Add integrations and workflows when you need them.

layerDescriptions.DomainModel: Recipes — pure business rules and ports. No database, HTTP, or ambient globals.
layerDescriptions.ApplicationOrchestration: Kitchen coordinator — use cases that call domain through ports only.
layerDescriptions.PresentationAdapters: Waiters — UI, routes, and controllers that drive use cases.
layerDescriptions.PersistenceAdapters: Suppliers — database, files, and external APIs implementing ports.
